steps.t: Thane Torferth stands on the road to Stoke. You should speak with Thane Torferth before the attack.
The Mead Hall of Stoke is at the end of the road. Torferth is making for the Mead Hall of Stoke, where he intends to confront Ordlac.
Dudsig and his guards are blocking the way to Ordlac and the children. Defeat them and confront Ordlac.
Thane Torferth is in the Mead Hall of Stoke. You should speak with Thane Torferth at once.
